phone.label: Mobile Number
phone.tooltip: Enter a 10-digit Indian mobile number starting with 6-9 (e.g., 9876543210)
phone.invalid: Please enter a valid Indian mobile number starting with 6-9
phone.exact: Mobile number must be exactly 10 digits

name.label: Full Name
name.tooShort: Too Short! Must be at least 3 characters long
name.minLength: Name must be at least 3 characters

email.label: Email
email.invalid: Your Email is not valid! Provide valid email

password.label: Password
password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.minLength6: Password must be at least 6 characters
password.confirmMismatch: Confirm password doesn't match with password
password.confirmMustMatch: Confirm password must match new password
password.mustUppercase: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter
password.mustNumber: Password must contain at least 1 number
password.tooltipRequirements: Must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

address.label: Your Address
address.tooShort: Too Short! Must be at least 3 characters long

loginRegister.loginDesc: Welcome back to 360Ghar! Please login to continue.
loginRegister.registerDesc: Join 360Ghar to discover your dream property and connect with trusted real estate professionals.

google.failed: Google sign-in could not be started. Please try again.

identifier.label: Email or mobile number
identifier.required: Enter your email or mobile number
identifier.invalid: Enter a valid email or 10-digit mobile number
identifier.phoneDigitsOnly: Mobile number must contain digits only
identifier.phoneWrongLength: Mobile number must be exactly 10 digits (you entered {{count}})
identifier.phoneInvalidStart: Indian mobile numbers must start with 6, 7, 8, or 9
identifier.eitherHint: You can sign in with either your email address or your 10-digit mobile number.
identifier.useDifferent: Use a different email or phone

otp.label: Verification code
otp.sentToPhone: We sent a 6-digit code to your phone.
otp.sentToEmail: We sent a 6-digit code to your email.
otp.verifyFailed: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
otp.sendFailed: Failed to send code. Please try again.

setPassword.heading: Set a password
setPassword.subheading: Create a password so you can sign in faster next time.
setPassword.required: To finish signing in, set a password for your account. This step is required.
setPassword.label: Create password
